curation_notes: Re-curated with updated guidelines. Advisory explicitly names server/actions/action_cloudstore_file_upload.go and the cloudstore.file.upload action. Patch touches 8 non-test source files adding filepath.Clean and traversal-stripping loops across multiple upload/file handlers. Primary locations derived from the advisory description (unzip and DoAction in the named file). Sibling locations added for action_csv_to_entity.go and action_xls_to_entity.go — both are in the same directory, serve the same role (file upload action handlers), and contain the identical unsanitized filename-to-filepath pattern. L1/L2/L3 hints improved: L1 broadened, L3 made more specific than L1/L2 with subsystem-level targeting. Vuln class path-traversal confirmed from CWE-22 and patch behavior.
